board.description: The ID of the board that is available under the `board` variable when evaluating the expression.

custom.description:
Custom context variables and their types. These variable types are available for use in a custom context:

 *  `user`: A [user](https://developer.atlassian.com/cloud/jira/platform/jira-expressions-type-reference#user) specified as an Atlassian account ID.
 *  `issue`: An [issue](https://developer.atlassian.com/cloud/jira/platform/jira-expressions-type-reference#issue) specified by ID or key. All the fields of the issue object are available in the Jira expression.
 *  `json`: A JSON object containing custom content.
 *  `list`: A JSON list of `user`, `issue`, or `json` variable types.

customerRequest.description: The ID of the customer request that is available under the `customerRequest` variable when evaluating the expression. This is the same as the ID of the underlying Jira issue, but the customer request context variable will have a different type.

issue.description: The issue that is available under the `issue` variable when evaluating the expression.

issues.description: The collection of issues that is available under the `issues` variable when evaluating the expression.

project.description: The project that is available under the `project` variable when evaluating the expression.

serviceDesk.description: The ID of the service desk that is available under the `serviceDesk` variable when evaluating the expression.

sprint.description: The ID of the sprint that is available under the `sprint` variable when evaluating the expression.
